tonight: Frigate Island / Union Island area — provisioning stop and island time.

captainMessage: We have moved from Tobago Cays to the Frigate Island / Union Island area. Today we are planning kite surfing fishing and a provisioning run. Breakfast is onboard lunch will be on an island somewhere and tomorrow we plan to head toward Mayreau.
funnyNote: Crew morale remains high. The official plan is adventure snacks provisions and not losing anyone during the kite surfing department.
